# kCFSOCKSVersionKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ CFNetwork ](/documentation/cfnetwork)

- [ kCFSOCKSVersionKey ](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfsocksversionkey)

-  kCFSOCKSVersionKey 

Global Variable# kCFSOCKSVersionKey

iOS 2.0+iPadOS 2.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
let kCFSOCKSVersionKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfsocksversionkey#Discussion)

If an error of type `kCFSOCKSErrorUnsupportedServerVersion` is returned, querying this key returns the SOCKS version in use by the current connection.
